title: Investments & savings
eodNote: Listed prices are end-of-day{{asOf}}. Unlisted schemes (crypto, FDs, off-list) use the current value you enter, else cost.
syncNote: Live prices appear once the daily market sync runs; unlisted schemes use the value you enter, else cost.
noInvAccountBodyPost: (or stocks/mutual-funds) account, then add stocks, mutual funds, SIPs, crypto, FDs and other schemes here.
noInvestments: No investments yet — add your first with the button above.
dividendsNote: Estimated from held quantities × declared dividends this financial year (Apr–Mar).
removeMsg: “{{label}}” will be removed from your portfolio.
sipNote: On each SIP date we record a transfer of {{amount}} from that account into {{account}} — it shows under Recurring & Planned Cashflow too.
newOrHold: Is this a new investment or one you already hold?
noFundAccount: No savings/bank account to fund from — add one first, or track it as existing.
overFunds: That's more than the balance in {{account}}. Reduce the amount or pick another account.
existingNote: No money leaves your accounts — this only records an investment you already own.
